app_title.title: Cognitive Bias Tester
app_title.description: Application name in the browser tab and main header, mapped from en.json app.title.

home_heading.title: Welcome
home_heading.description: Hero heading on the home page, mapped from en.json home.heading.

nav_home.title: Home
nav_home.description: Navigation link to the landing page.

nav_settings.title: Settings
nav_settings.description: Navigation menu item for user preferences.

btn_start_quiz.title: Start
btn_start_quiz.description: Primary button to begin a quiz session.

btn_submit_answer.title: Submit answer
btn_submit_answer.description: Confirms the selected option for the current case.

result_correct.title: Correct
result_correct.description: Short caption when the user picked the unbiased option.

result_incorrect.title: Not quite
result_incorrect.description: Caption when the chosen option is suboptimal.

error_generic.title: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error_generic.description: Generic API or network failure message.

error_not_found.title: We could not find that resource.
error_not_found.description: Shown when a requested entity is missing.

settings_locale.title: Language
settings_locale.description: Label for locale selection in settings.

footer_tagline.title: Train critical thinking, one bias at a time.
footer_tagline.description: Short tagline shown in the page footer.

bias_catalog_heading.title: Explore cognitive biases
bias_catalog_heading.description: Heading above the list of bias categories.

loading_message.title: Loading…
loading_message.description: Shown while async data is fetched.
